title: hypertelis umbellata
intro: Hypertelis umbellata, also known as Umbellata, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hypertelis umbellata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Hypertelis umbellata is commonly prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal remedies, such as teas and salves.
